items.hook: Before you commit to anything, find out your exact stamp duty and ABSD
items.caption: Before you commit to anything, find out your exact stamp duty and ABSD. Most buyers only check after they have already decided, and that is when the shock hits. It is free at propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 下手之前，先搞清楚自己要付多少印花税和 ABSD。很多买家都是决定了之后才去查，结果被数字吓一跳。免费的，去 propsight.sg 看，链接在简介。

items.hook: People say a lot of things about property prices
items.caption:
People say a lot of things about property prices. The actual numbers from recent sales often tell a very different story. Check any home yourself, free, at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Save this before you view.
items.cap_zh:
关于房产价格，坊间有很多说法。但真实的成交数据往往说的是另一回事。任何房子都可以免费查，就在 propsight.sg，链接在简介。

看房前先存起来。

items.hook: In most towns, a 4-room pulls a few hundred dollars more a month in rent than a 3-room
items.caption:
In most towns, a 4-room pulls a few hundred dollars more a month in rent than a 3-room. Whether that bigger unit is worth the higher price comes down to yield. Check any block for free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
在大多数市镇，4房式HDB的月租比3房式高出几百新元。更大的单位是否值那更高的买入价，关键还是要看回报率。到propsight.sg免费查任何一栋，链接在简介。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Keep this before you sign anything
items.caption:
Keep this before you sign anything. The small things most buyers overlook can swing the final number by thousands. Sort it all out free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Save this before you view.
items.cap_zh:
签字之前先把这个存好。很多买家忽略的小细节，最后可以省下或多花好几千块。去propsight.sg免费算清楚，链接在简介。

看房前先存起来。

items.hook: Private home prices rose 0.5% in Q2 2026 while HDB resale prices fell for the second str
items.caption:
Private home prices rose 0.5% in Q2 2026 while HDB resale prices fell for the second straight quarter. The two markets are pulling in opposite directions and the gap is starting to matter. If you are buying HDB resale, this is a window where sellers tend to have less leverage. Check the latest transaction data and price trends at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
2026年第二季度，私人住宅价格上涨0.5%，而HDB转售价格连续第二个季度下滑。两个市场正朝着不同方向走，这个落差值得关注。如果你正在考虑购买HDB转售组屋，现在卖家的议价空间比以前更大。最新成交数据和价格走势，到 propsight.sg 查看，链接在简介栏。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: 5 grants first-time buyers quietly leave on the table.
items.caption: First-time buyers can stack more housing grants than most realise. Here are the ones people quietly miss. Check exactly what you qualify for, free, link in bio. Save this before you book.
items.cap_zh: 第一次买房，能拿的津贴比很多人想的多。这些是大家默默错过的。免费查你符合哪些，链接在简介。买房前先存起来。

items.hook: HDB landlords are out-earning condo landlords: 6.1% vs 3.6%.
items.caption:
Right now, an HDB resale flat returns about 6.1% gross for a landlord, versus about 3.6% for a private condo. Bigger price tag does not mean bigger yield. See the real numbers on any home, free, at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Worth saving before you talk to an agent.
items.cap_zh:
现在，组屋转售出租的毛回报大约 6.1%，私宅公寓大约 3.6%。房价高不代表回报高。免费查任何房子的真实数字，propsight.sg，链接在简介。

找中介前，值得先存下来。

items.hook: Your flat may be worth more than the agent says.
The PropSight tools are free to use.
